star_1.text: this game became one of my favorites right away it WAS a great game, however the game crashes every time I try to open it. I uninstalled/reinstalled there are no updates, I deleted the cash and my memory is not an issue and I'm using a brand new s25. so fix the game and I will change my review. I have played 45 hours since the beginning of February. so if your time is valuable do not waste it playing this game!

I miss the old way the game played. Also, could you screen your ads better PLEASE!!!!!! I am tired of glitchy ads, or scammers, or porn!!!! once you time travel the game is lame and boring to play so I highly suggest that even though you won't unlock anything else to not do it.

It's a five-star game, which is why it pains me to rate this one star. I gave this rating because upon downloading the game over and over again on multiple occasions, the game always ends up crashing and kicking me out.

Instant Uninstall. I was scrolling for more than 10 minutes opting out of all the ENDLESS cookies and advertising consent options. Beware: This app will put an absurd amount of tracking on your phone if you do not opt out. One that I read was a tracking cookie for 390 days!
Has ads that literally do not end. The only way to exit them is to exit the app and undo your entire run. Very sad when games prioritise ads over experience this way.
It keeps saying forced closed due to internal error and check playstore if any updates please tell us if any error is happening

Genuinely impressed that they managed to ruin burrito bison. the game is great except the grind. why is it so grindy? To force you to buy extremely expensive microtransactions or watch ads. Burrito bison, but ruined by monetisation.
I can't get back into the game. Keeps closing. this is after I unlocked the robot. I didn't even get to time travel yet.

Would rate a lot higher if they didn't try to trick you into SO MANY permissions. Even if you choose minimal on first screen, you have to check other screen of "optional" permission with at least 30 more companies they are trying to share your information with. If you choose that you don't want to share information, shouldn't be this hard!

Until today, 12/21/25, I had loved and played this game since 2016. The fact that I gave up scrolling through consent toggles after about 30 minutes of scrolling to prevent a bunch of companies uselessly harvesting data from my phone has absolutely broke my trust in the developers, publishers, and anyone else who has tried to put their grubby data hungry fingers into my device. Never again will I use another app from any of the above mentioned institutions. Kongregate, Pogue Mahone.

game is fun when I had basically everything unlocked. came back after a while and literally all my progress and save data is gone. I have nearly every achievement on Google play but no progress to show for it.

A decent idea ruined by the usual mobile game traits, progress moves at an absolute snails pace - even if you were to spend money. There is no real gameplay, flick your finger and tap occasionally. You reach a new area and replay it multiple times to get enough cash to upgrade yourself then rinse and repeat. It's an interactive "clicker" game that relies heavily on luck if you get a good run or not. Like most games of this type you'll play for a week then wonder why you're wasting your time.

I love this game, but it has been losing touch input at the end of runs more and more often to the point now that almost everytime I get a pinata on a run, I cannot bash it to open the prize. I am forced, instead, to completely close the app and restart it, losing the run I just had and all of the associated loot. I have spent money on this game (and I almost never do that) because it IS lots of fun. BUT it constantly having this issue is killing it for me. EDIT: it has only gotten worse.

It's been a good couple years since I played it last. I quit because the game gives you no choice or preference in which character to play as. Totally ruins it because the other characters are just not fun to play as. First review. Game forces you to play as different characters. One character is clearly at an advantage. She uses a grappling hook that locks on to gummies and she retains speed longer. Is really not fun. It feels like I'm forced to use a cheating character and drains the fun.

Game has one of the worst endgame. Takes a long time to achieve anything. Earning recipe pieces should be easier than this. And you need to be able to undo purchases because some are completely pointless and a waste which adds a lot to the grind. Some glitchy gameplay that can cause airborne objects to move much faster than you can ever hope to catch.

I played for a pretty long time, stopped and recently game back to it and loved it still but now i am stuck on some missions that just don't tick off even tho you did them. Please add a "skip mission" option or an option to see and select queued missions cause i have 3 that i can't beat and over 20 or so waiting. Please do something about this cause it takes away a lot of the fun

Its a good game, very fun but dont bother with the ads. They never work, the game asks you over and over to watch ONE ad and then it shows you two ads in a row and then you dont get the reward. Its an intended bug to make you watch more ads. After a certain point the cop bears become too op, a single hit will stop you completely, forcing you to buy extra lives. Game is rigged. Wont give more than one star until this greedy "bug" is fixed. Shame on the devs.

The game itself is so fun, but I always get this one error where you are unable to press any buttons at the end of stage where you're supposed to be getting your rewards so you are forced to restart the app and not get any rewards amd waste time and maybe even powerups used. This makes me kinda want to uninstall because it happens frequently.

Gameplay is good overall, unlocking everything is so hard prices increase a s*** ton. What's the point of adding piñatas in the path when you will have to watch an ad to receive it? Just a bunch of ads every moment you play. I don't watch a single one as it will just give them money over and over. Might as well delete the game at this point.

The game is buggy, it'll crash occasionally before you get the rewards from your piñatas, and sometimes assets won't load in. Later on, an "upgrade" is forced down your throat that removes the progress from your Buffed Out+ upgrades ("so you can try new combinations!"). I sat there and watched the last 20 minutes of progress delete itself and decided I had better ways to waste my time.

star_2.text: Game's great overall, just the Pinjata's that are that small but significan't both great and small doses, the simple getting your way for supposedly collecting something that has to help you sucks. The issue is the it gets in the way not really the you have to watch an ad yo unlock, though thats painful too. It should put in an collection bag if you want to use it or not or just go back in the gameplay, also you shouldn't be able to pay for them as thats gambling

It's DEFINITELY not like the original you know and love!! instead of the original bison you play as, it constantly changes your character to like 4 other random MF's!! and everything is EXTREMELY EXPENSIVE!! I dont remember the original games upgrades being in the millions. but this one is. so be prepared to grind..

when I was playing I hit a glitch and now i can't unlock cake eater and normally I wouldn't care about missing an upgrade but without this one the gameplay is at a snails pace and there's literally nothing I can do to proceed faster

It's fine, but too expensive. To remove the ads and earn full "a.k.a. 4x the money" it costs $18. To unlock everything it's $30. That's way too much for a game like this. Yes you can play it for free, but the exaggerated grind makes for an unenjoyable experience. It's not worth it to me.

So I was hugely enjoying this game, to the point that I even bought some permanent upgrades. That was until I purchased the x15 piñata pack... I bought the pack, opened the pinatas and got my items, all good. Then, after a few runs it was time to time travel. Guess what happens when you time travel? That's right, you lose all your items, including ones that came out of pinatas that you purchased. It's pretty stupid to have a system that allows you to lose everything you purchased.

I like the art, theme, music, and feel of the game. Unfortunately, wether or not you can punch through the cake wall (the way you progress to the next area) doesn't feel like it depends on your speed and performance in the launch, but instead hardcoded to not let you progress unless you've passed a threshold of upgrades, which are pretty grindy. That plus the fact that you can't do much to control the character, neither through the initial launch nor during the flight, makes it not a fun game.

Been playing for a while now and just got back these days. Wonderful game, but the recent visual bugs at the first boots of the app was killing me, and we all can't access Play Games™ to sync the account. The black squares loading in place of every sprite except the main characters and standard gummies really adds an unnecessary difficulty. But it's only a front-end glitch, so it should be easy to fix in the next patch, so you guys need to do it ASAP for better gameplay and ratings.

Fun game with fun stretch goals. Very buggy though, it randomly stops registering clicks sometimes. So you can finish a really good run then become unable to click continue and have to reboot the game.... But that makes you lose all your run gains, even though you have already finished the run..

I want to love this game but there are some glaring issues. Grinding/ near impossible endgame, you can only pause when you play certain characters, and some challenges are permanently bugged (play with your nose never works, terrible idea). Initially it was a great fun game but now it's just not worth any of my time

I understand ads are how you make money but come on. Very EA of you. The gameplay is great just how the browser based game was with a bit more content. BUT . The prices for upgrades get insane, so they have been very sneaky and made it so you have to watch ads to increase your gold multiplier. So your forced to watch 4 to 5 ads just to get a better multiplier and even then it's a massive grind. Not to mention the piñata system gets old real fast.

Ok I lied, I had only played it for a couple days and I hadn't gotten the chance to realize how disgusting this game is. You can see it trying to play against you in the 'r'ng and it's incredibly grindy and boring once you start to get any kind of progress. I'm sorry but this game was fun with no ads and 0 in app purchases for years. Took some real greed to mess that up.

Easy and fun to play. You can be really casual with it or really try to grind. Only issue is that your saved data doesn't transfer to another device! Its so disappointing and discouraging. I've put in some fun hours but now that I have a new phone none of my progress is saved. Please fix this. Oh and recently some of the object don't render and it just shows a black box...?

I played the original on browser and loved it. This version is fun, but they've slowed down the progress you can make drastically, obviously to push microtransactions. I've hit a wall where I can't push through the next section because the grind to get the next cheapest upgrade takes so so long. It's a shame developers do this. All they're thinking about it money!

the first game was great. this have is blatantly a micro transaction game. even with me sending 5 dollars on ad away, the gameplay is much to slow to be enjoyable. would need so much more fun if advancing the game was faster. the abilities do very little. you never feel as though you have control over what happens.

This game is pretty fun, however there is a serious graphical bug where arts assets are not displayed properly, resulting in black rectangles everywhere instead of properly displaying powerups and enemies. A real shame, because I actually wanted to continue playing the game. But without actually being able to see what I need to do, the game is not really in a good playable state... :(

It's a pretty fun game that I'm playing on and off for a while and I enjoy it, but everything except the luncher the "villain" and normal gummies are just black boxes, I really don't want to uninstall and lose all my progress it would be great if you guys could patch it gameplay doesn't change much but it isn't very appealing to look at.

Fix the ads not giving you the ability to back out. Ads work 1 in 10 times and it makes it annoying that I have to fully close down the game and start it again to continue playing. More than happy to watch ads bit there is no time or any way to exit the ad if there is a bug. Get it sorted please!

Unfortunately revising my rating to a 2. The game is a lot of fun and if you really want to avoid ads, you absolutely can (though it will slow your substantially eventually). The real killer is a single endgame glitch. If you're a completion like me, you'll find that it's actually quite terrible, the game effectively punishes you for getting deeper in the endgame. There is a glitch that results in literally endless runs where you can't make progress. Really sucks that they haven't fixed it...

Since the recent update my app won't even open. It shows the launcha libre opening screen, then crashes. It was working yesterday just fine, that being said this is a very fun game and I hope it works soon. I don't want to uninstall and reinstall because I'm not sure if I'll lose my data. Edit: 5 days have passed since I contacted support and I'm still waiting for a reply. The in game shop menu will not allow me to log back into my google play account and attempt to recover my data.

its was a realy realy good game. but there is a huge misstake. change the launch dirrection. impossible the make it back. its sooooo bad. even painfull. i even dont want to play anymore. and just a piece of the cake after the second time travell what you put money for the money multiplier, you just simple isnt get it. so i did again the time travell, i put all my coin (23) to money multiplier but im got only 11. I dont know its a bug, but feels bad. anyway. was fun but not anymore.

star_3.text: It's great, honestly. Only problem is their monetization options are FAR too expensive. It's like $30 for all the permanent options? That's just dumb. Edit: Years later and I feel exactly the same about it. Fantastic, even addictive game, BUT all the monetization is 3 times the price it SHOULD be. You're acting like this is a console game, but it's NOT. It's on the phone and that automatically lowers the expected price-point.

Despite being very far into the game, Cake Wall nor Jon Zzzena didn't unlock for me, TOOK HOURS OF GRINDING TO GET TO THIS POINT BTW, yes, this game is VERY GRINDY, to the point it is almost tiring. I have mixed opinions on this game, cuz... man, I also remember playing the old Burrito Bison, I have nostalgia and also El Mr Flyguy is rlly cool BUT GODDAMN THIS GAME IS GRINDY OMG, ESPECIALLY STOPWATCH MODE I HATE IT
fun but watching an ad then can't close and claim the prize, X in the top isn't clickable after it finishes, can only click back :( missed 5 pinatas already
Game has suddenly started randomly restarting runs on its own, in the middle of a run. Otherwise a very fun and engaging game.

There is a fun and engaging game in here, but the constant nickel and diming at every opportunity is annoying at the best of times and expensive at the worst. It also becomes pretty obvious when you get far enough in that the game is very artificially difficult: your launch speed will suddenly become much slower despite all other factors remaining the same, and the gummy bears will move around to either help you out or to screw you over depending on what the developers are trying to incentivise

It's a good game. The graphics are charming, the sound design is great, and the progression feels natural and consistant. The issue is the sheer number of ads it throws at you. Ads for pickups, ads for multipliers, ads for microtransactions; you can't play the game for two minutes without it begging for cash from either your eyes or your wallet. They are technically optional, if you want to be playing with a 66% malus on your in-game currency.

The game is great, addictive and fun to play but after a while it glitched and all the npcs that interact with your char in the game turned into a black box. The game is unplayable cause you can't tell the difference between the good and the bad npcs so you go blindly and hope you land on a good one. I uninstalled the game and reinstalled it and that fixed the issue but after a few games it came back. I really like the game's idea but it needs some bug fixes. Hope the devs do that.

Cool game, blast from the past and all, but when you hit the end cookie wall on rift levels, get blasted through by a worm diamond, and then hit by a chili (because you stopped at the wall) the game freezes. This has happened several times, and it's a bit annoying.

This game is super fun and addictive! I LOVE the pinapple girl the most, and the mini-games you get when smashing gummies are AMAZING!!! The backgrounds are wonderful along with all the bosses and gummies themselfs. I played the game on computer and when i found the app, i fell in love with it :) but i know your wondering, "if the game is so good, then why would you give it 3 stars?" i gave the game 3 stars because it takes too long to get money, even with money upgrades. Please fix this.

Everything gets a bit expensive a bit too quick and it makes the game feel more limited when you consider how slow you actually start off in the game and how much there is to gain, want more to look forward too though, still fun & still enjoying it :)

The game is fun and the controls are good and easy to understand. Great for play a couple levels real quick and spend. Maybe like 5 to 10 minutes playing just to quit. The only major downside is two out of five times. Roughly advertisements will not give me the pinatas. I usually have to watch two or three advertisements just to get it. And for that reason I'm just going to uninstall and give you three stars

So far the game is awsome, but for some reason there's a glitch that after a run I won't be able to click anything on my screen and it only fixes when I restart the game... Which means I loose the last run. Normally I would be mad but just few minutes ago it happened like 3-4 runs in a row. And I ended up loosing some good runs, time and pinatas. If y'all fix this I'll change my review to 5 stars since it rly is one of the best games there is.

This is a great game not gona lie but when you spent 2 years of grinding everything to find out that your account has been lost it can be a little frustrating. This is a super fun game and I love the detail but when I found out that I couldn't recover my account that was a bit frustrating, If there is anything that you guys could do so that I could get my account back I would appreciate that a lot. Other than that this game is super fun and has very fun levels to play good game🎮

It's a very good game. Unfortunately, I kept running into bugs. Sometimes when I opened the game all the gummies, piñata and the power ups are black boxes. It won't go back to normal unless you restart the game. Sometimes when I try to watch an ads get piñata and when the ad is done, the game crashes right away. I felt scammed. I do it always and everytime but it always crashes. When you're lucky you'll get it but mostly, the game crashes and you don't get the piñata. Please fix this

Fun minus the bugs. Game displays black boxes in place of game pieces at times. Freezes periodically. Both bugs seem affiliated with pinatas. Logged in with facebook to save progress after making it beyond frying pan. Uninstalled, reinstalled hoping for less problems. Logged back in with facebook and BAM. All progress was lost and had to start all over. Fun game, but needs a few fixes.

I would've given this game 5 stars if it weren't for this new glitch I've found. During random parts of gameplay, the screen breifly pauses, then restarts entirely. However, its an awesome game, don't get me wrong. I highly recommend. These are just the little things that keep it from being the best mobile game.

The initial grinding process for this game is very rewarding and figuring out tricks you can do to get some of the achievements is quite fun, but after the midpoint of the game it's hard to find any reason to motivate myself to keep playing it. I've been playing it for a long time, and everything has just become too formulaic for me to keep playing at this point (collecting all the time shards and time traveling gets boring after a while). If there was an ending, maybe I would care to play more.

Fun and well made game. But whenever I watch an ad to get a pinata or pinatas around a 1/3 of the time the game doesn't register that watched the ad and doesn't give me my rewards. So I have to watch an ad a second time. This has become extremely annoying and has prevented me from giving this game five star.

Ran fine most of the time, was quite fun. Played for a long time. After months it started glitching, bears were black squares, got it to correct a couple times. Could not back up game data, had to re-install. Happened a second time, did not re-install again. This is a long term game, so the game data not saving and glitching in a way that requires a re-install makes it unusable as all over time progress is lost often. Otherwise 4-5 stars, fun game. Hope they fixed this glitch.

I really like this game, honestly, but every time I open the app either some or all of my progress is lost. That includes upgrades, characters and bosses. I've tried hitting the reset progress button to see if that solves the problem but no luck. The only progress that saves is the no ads I bought

star_4.text: I would rather pay for games over the free-to-play model... but this game gets in-app-purchases right for me if its going to be there at all.  I played the game a lot, it has solid mechanics and game play, the characters are simple but interesting.  So I felt it was worth a few bucks to play ad-free when the feature came up on sale for me.  Then I played more, and personally found value in other upgrades.  By the end I had bought every permanent upgrade when on sale for half price and feel like it was a fair price for the time the game entertained me.  In fact, I'm writing this review because I came back to the store to see if there was a sequel or other games that used this more fair IAP model that may be worth my time.  Beyond that, I've gotten every achievement in the game except for one, which is hard to get if you don't focus on it early on before the characters improve.

Edit: Unlocked keeping upgrades after rifting. It's more entertaining in some ways because you get all upgrades at once. They should almost make a new endgame out of this endgame, or at least add a recipe only physically possible to achieve after this is unlocked. Pre-Edit: It's $30 to be enjoyable, but buying the full game reduces the time it takes to beat significantly and there isn't much going on in the end game. I expected more from the end game than a negative exponent.

This game is near perfect, all ads are COMPLETELY optional while giving you a reward for watching one. The controls are smooth aswell as the game overall and I love all the wacky characters, environments, etc. Its a fun to playthrough but I do have 2 main complaints. 1: The game at times can feel a bit grindy ESPECIALLY when your doing the whole rifts. 2: For some reason idk if it's my phone or what but when I watch an ad the game doesn't register forcing me to watch another one for zero reason.

reminiscent of the old burrito bison games i used to play way back when, so it was really nice to see it again. i really enjoy playing it when the internet is down, and i'd say it's pretty wise about payment and showing ads. i think the new characters, new opponents, and new gameplay intuition are really interesting, and overall i like it a lot. i think i'd definitely recommend this to a friend if they were looking for a new mobile game, even if they hadn't played the free online version first.

Fun game with extensive progression paths and enduring replayability. Things slow down when you get down to the final 4 or so character upgrades, but it has a nice steady pace to that point. The art style, character design, and humor/visual gags are well done. Ads are optional and not at all intrusive. You can pay for boosts, but you have access to the full experience without paid upgrades. Very well done.

It is a fun game to pass time. I enjoy everything about it. It is a sling-shot Libre-themed game. There boosts to earn as you play through completing challenges, upgrading characters, emenies, and compents, and watching ads. Finally a game where ads are not forced on you. Yes, obviously for extra boosts for free, 10-30s ads are not bad in my opinion. The only con is the challenges are definitely challenging and I just cannot complete some of them. Great colorful fun game!

This is a really, really good game. Looks good, plays well, and is just the right level of irritating. I will definitely bump up to give stars if the issue of making me watch two ads for a reward stops happening. It's a bit sly and happens too often for me not to think it's done purposely. Definitely isn't enough to put me off coming back and back again though.

One of my favorite games for short spurts of entertainment. Beat the main game, but still pop in every once in a while for newly added content and run against the clock mode. Google Play Games support is completely broken, the button does nothing (lots of other reviews confirm it is not just me). Got a new phone and cannot restore my progress, and I'm not going to start from the beginning so I guess I'm done with this game for good.

Overall fun game! The biggest downside is the mechanic of the cake walls. Instead of slowly seeing yourself getting better with every round, you get stuck slamming into the same wall about 50 times before finally being able to break through, it gets kinda old. Though the controls are smooth, and the theme is a lot of fun!

It's a wonderful addition to the Burrito Bison series, but not quite the best entry. This one feels much longer, but in a grindier way, rather than a skill or carefully timing-your-clicks sort of way like Burrito Bison Revenge from 2012. This feels less like a browser game staple and more like a mobile game through and through, video ad warts and all. Despite all the monetary nonsense, the "click, launch, rocket-slam, cake wall-eat, repeat" formula is still as addicting as ever!

The game's amazing. Apparently there is no end to the bugs possible though. I haven't run into some of the more common ones other people have - yet - but I sure did run into an apparently reproducible one. Once you get to the portal, it seems like if you manage to hit the clouds and drop a gummy meteor JUST as you're reaching the ending door, the game just locks up, sitting on the spacey background, and does nothing.

I can say that this is true to the source material. I played the flash game many years ago and I find the Android version is as fun, and tops it in terms of many gameplay mechanics & interesting upgrades. There are ads, but within reason. It is reasonably play-to-win, but it's enjoyable (so far; 3rd area) without paying.

blast from the past, excellent game still. the ads are everywhere and shoved in your face but technically not 'necessary' to play the game they just really make you feel like you need to watch them to progress, even though you technically don't. that's the minus one star.

I used to enjoy playing this game! It used to be addicting and loved squishing lots of evils gummies to a pulp! Now, the game tasks now feels repetitive and boring and it has some minor gameplay bugs which are a little annoying. Apart from that, this game was enjoyable.

fantastic game! I used to play this when I was younger and it was a blast! the unique opponents, unique mini game gummy bears, little food guys who act as power ups, it's all just so unique and different! one issue I have with it is that you barley do anything other than rocket slam but everything else makes up for it.

lemme tell you something the start is great making it to the time travel is amazing but after time traveling a couple of time this gets repetitive and grindy at this point im looking for a sequel. it's been years. the game is successful give us a sequel Already.

I used to play this game on Kongregate, so much nostalgia, good times. This version has so much more content, amazing work. The game is 5 stars, but I'm taking away one star because sometimes when watching an ad the reward is not unlocked, so you have to watch it again. I don't mind watching ads, and I really want to help the developer, but it's very frustrating.
I give four because it doesn't hound you with ads in gameplay and it's actually kind of fun I out four stars cause gameplay is a little slow on progression but that's about it

Each game play is short, making it enjoyable in short bursts. The ads are not intrusive and always optional. The amount of things to do is just outstanding, the game doesn't get boring soon, unlike many similar games. The only reason I haven't rated 5 stars is because of a bug, which happens when you watch an ad to get more pinatas, and causes objects to turn into black rectangles. If it's fixed, the game deserves full points. Better hints for special gummy bears would be a bonus.

Hey, so real fun game. One thing, I just got the upgrade "a step back" and for some reason the game gets laggy as hell... I mean I like the upgrade but the game becomes difficult when it's on because of the lag. Also, i think it'd be a good call to have a confirmation window before getting an upgrade, the recipe pieces are tough to get and a missclick would just waste a bunch on something you potentially don't want.

star_5.text: It did freeze up on me once and one time, the pause button wasn't showing, but I think it was because I didn't have a lot of space left on my phone or it could be the battery getting drained. One thing, I always noticed is that if I'm playing a mobile game and it messes up in some way, it's sometimes because I used up a lot of space on my phone because sometimes when I free up space, the game would work better afterwards, but now, it's working great. Addictive and great time waster.

I absolutely love this game! You can tell the developers put a lot of love in the game because the only ads that you can get are for certain awards, they aren't in your face like other mobile games. The gameplay is also super addictive and really thought out. The features make you want to keep coming back too. From collecting enemies to upgrades to heroes, this game has everything it needs and more for a great mobile game.

there is nothing bad that I can say about this game. nothing at all. The advertisements are only existent if you want extra piñata rewards, and nowhere else. heck, there's even a chance you can unlock a rewards mission TO PLAY AN ENTIRE LAUNCH WITH YOUR NOSE. AND IT ACTUALLY WORKS. if you want a fun game to quickly kill some time, this is the best one for you.

It started off a little slow for me, especially not knowing the concepts and what exactly was happening on launch but now it's my go-to game. Biggest pro; NO ADS.* Let me repeat myself, NO ADS after any launches or gameplay moments. The only ad you ever get is from Pinata openings and those are just bonuses that add to the fun, not make the fun. I wanted a game to launch something long distances and I got just that and then some. Solid work from the dev (or dev team) for this banger.

Weirdly fun game. It has a great game loop. You don't need to buy anything to enjoy it, but I've bought a couple of the permanent upgrades because I want to support the creator. Still learning what is what but basically you launch your wrestler towards a boss, then you bounce on gummy bears and through cakes, for as long as you can go. I've been playing it in short bursts.

I have trouble playing most mobile games for more than a few minutes. However, this game has reminded me of the potential they really have. The music is very well composed, squishing the gummies is fun, and even the little animations that each character does (both playable and enemies) is really well done and fun to watch. A single game can last for only a few seconds, but even so those few seconds are very fun. It doesn't take long to get going faster and farther either. Overall, very fun game.

I did it... I've unlocked EVERY in-game item. It took years, but I think I won. I say this to encourage the developers to add skin variants, new opponents, limited special gummies, more boss battles, etc. It'd be amazing. I'm not sure how long I've been playing at this point, but it'd help keep players motivated to keep playing. Rifts get really grindy after a while.

Very fun game with the absolute bare minimum of ads and in-game purchases. Ads are completely voluntary, only if you want to open up a pinata for a little extra cash or a power up. However, the pinatas are completely optional; your progression will never be hopelessly stalled for lack of a power up or money. Great replayability with the time travel mechanic, which also makes collecting the recipe pieces for permanent power ups much less of a grind. Highly recommend!!

Everything about this is great, a perfect step up from the flash version I played on kongregate years ago, I just wish I had the option to keep "buffed out" upgrades through rifts. I go through them so quickly that there's almost no point in upgrading them at all if it's just gonna disappear. Otherwise, great game, 10/10! update edit: you can now do that with one of the new upgrades! I love this game!

Genuinely a good game to pass time with. It actually gives you the option to watch ads for more in-game coin multipliers and piñatas, rather than forcing you to watch an ad every few minutes for no in game rewards like some other mobile games do. Not gonna name names but you know who you are... I didn't know what to expect at first but I really enjoy this in my free time!

I use to play this game as a kid. I'm in my twenties now so it's been quite awhile and met me tell you, it brings back memories. I love this game with a passion. Pros- It's a good game to pass time and have a little fun. It somewhat a "challenge"per say to further yourself ahead and upgrade your stats, etc. Cons- It can be a little boring after a certain period of time. So take breaks ig. The prices in the upgrades increase dramatically. But it's cool tho. It does bug out, but rarly.

I vividly remember playing this on my school chromebook when i was young. it's just as fun as i remember, and the addition of extra characters and challengers has really spiced it up. if you are looking for a good game to kill time, this game is perfect. the only ads are voluntary, the gameplay is repetative enough to not be hard, but interesting enough to keep it entertaining, and the game is unique. honestly one of my favorite mobile games

Update 5/3/21: There is a limit to how many times you can time travel and upgrade speed before the game glitches. I still wish they had endless doors mode like on desktop had but it's still a fun mobile game! I recommend it. 2017 review: I used to play the desktop version of this game! It's good to see it as an app. It's a bit different of course but I'm really enjoying it. I love that you can keep time traveling and go farther and farther. Still a great game all these years later.

Played this as a flash game what seems like forever ago. Endless fun, flying through the air at Mach 4 while pounding gummy bears and breaking through chocolate chip doors. The upgrades and opponents are VERY extensive. Love the gameplay, love the artstyle. Just an amazing game. On the other hand, I've been encountering this bug during gameplay that would reset all progress on the next rift door. No idea why. It's a pain.

Ah, I remember the original Burrito Bison, and when I saw this, I thought I should give it a go. Needless to say by my five star review, I absolutely LOVE this game. Flash games where you kept leveling up your powerups back in the day was my elementary school jam. And it hasn't lost it's fun and charm! Great fun, soundtrack, characters, and really an improvement on the original game.

The Best. It reminds me a bit of another great game, Dufus Drop, because of its sheer ridiculousness but also In that the more things you acquire by playing the game and purchasing level-ups for a slew of off-the-wall items (don't need cash, you buy with the credit you earn by playing the game) the better the game gets and the more things that open up like crazy rides on blue underground diving worms. There's just lots of surprises and it gets better and better.

Everything about this game art style and all is super enjoyable for me, especially as an artist myself. There is no pressure to buy any upgrades with actual money, there's plenty of opportunity to earn upgrades by playing the game consistently... Honestly, my most favorite part is probably the creativity that went behind the names for characters and stuff.

Still a very fun game to this day and still play it every day. However, there is a lot more glitches than I remember. Some rift runs have actually been stolen by a few even due to softlocks. If I could report them (with a response of desire to fix them) then I'd love that. But currently I'm just playing with what bugs to deal with during so.

What an absolute masterpiece. Through all the games I've played on mobile, this has been the BEST I've ever played. The stunning visuals, gameplay, replayability, and progression are absolutely mastered and even with a weak phone they even perfected optimization too. I have a pretty good suggestion to make this game even more exciting; whenever you hit or ride a special gummy bear and then during it you hit another one, it gives a combo indicator and it stacks to either give more points or speed

Really fun game so far, similar to those "learn to fly" games but more polished and on your phone. You repeately launch your character to earn money, use that money to buy upgrades that'll help you launch further and earn more money, etc. Has some unique mechanics like the ring opponent and money multipliers. Ads are optional for rewards and can be permanently removed. Only complaint is that sometimes when I try to watch ads for extra pinatas, the app tells me the request couldn't be processed.
